summary: This is a brief announcement post where Jeff Atwood notifies readers about his upcoming speaking engagement at the 2005 Raleigh Code Camp at NC State. He will be presenting on User Friendly Exception Handling Strategies. The post expresses his enthusiasm about attending a technical conference after a long hiatus.
key_points: Jeff Atwood is speaking at the 2005 Raleigh Code Camp at NC State
His presentation topic is User Friendly Exception Handling Strategies at 10:15am
He notes it has been years since he attended a technical conference
money_quotes: I haven't had an opportunity to attend a technical conference in years, so I'm really looking forward to this!
key_insight: A simple event announcement reflecting the value developers place on in-person technical community gatherings.
